calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Modify Trust, For Instructions To Distribute Certain Real Property, Accept Resignation Of Trustee, Appoint New Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karl Mill, Nicole Ryan and Scott Nonaka appeared by zoom for Board of Trustees of The Glide Foundation.
Brent Rychener and John Shiner appeared by telephone for Cal Nevada Annual Conference of the United Methodist Church.

The Court stated that the Attorney General filed a conditional statement of non-opposition and that it wants some language in the order with respect to the foundation remaining registered with the Attorney General's Registry of Charitable Trusts, that a waiver of notice was filed by the Board of Missions, that there is a notice issue as there is no notice to the universe of folks/interested parties like donors, and questions why notice by posting or publication would not be appropriate. Mr. Mill stated that the foundation has been very vocal with the settlement and transparent with the donors, that no one has requested special notice at this time and asked that the notice that has been provided be sufficient. Mr. Rychener stated that there has been adequate publication, that notice has been out there and that there shouldn't be any confusion. Mr. Nonaka stated that they don't have any donor post restrictions on them and that the settlement agreement has a provision in it that is meant to address future donation and that specific mediation provisions are in place. The Petition for Order to Modify Trust, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
